taglines: Don't forget to drink 2L of water today
There are 10 types of people: those who get binary and those who don't
Have you tried turning it off and on again?
Production is just staging with consequences
Sleep is for people who don't have side projects
hero.description: I live at the intersection of **frontend** and **backend** with TypeScript. I build clean, scalable __React__ interfaces and reliable __Node.js__ APIs that ship to production.

fileBanner: // Fresher Fullstack Developer | Problem Solver | Coffee & Code Enthusiast
professionalSummary: I'm a **fresher fullstack developer** passionate about building high-performance web applications. My expertise spans from crafting seamless user interfaces to architecting scalable backend systems.

Specializing in **Next.js**, **React**, **NestJS**, and **PostgreSQL**, I focus on writing clean, type-safe code and delivering products that prioritize user experience. I believe great software solves real problems elegantly.
milestones: Built **10+ projects** across personal, freelance, and learning contexts covering frontend, backend, and fullstack development
Mastered the **TypeScript** ecosystem from React frontends to NestJS backends with Prisma ORM
Explored **cloud deployments** on Render, Clever Cloud, and AWS for various side projects
Constantly improving through **open-source contributions** on GitHub (smoluca123)

interests.title: Coding
interests.description: Exploring new technologies and open-source contributions

interests.title: Coffee
interests.description: My fuel for debugging, thinking, and solving problems

interests.title: Guitar
interests.description: Balancing technical precision with creative expression

about.philosophy: Great software is built on three pillars: **clean code**, **user empathy**, and **continuous learning**. I strive to create products that are not just functional, but truly delightful to use.

experiences.title: Fresher Fullstack Web Developer
experiences.description: Building and shipping fullstack web applications using React, Next.js, NestJS, and PostgreSQL. Focused on clean architecture, type safety with TypeScript, and delivering polished user experiences.

projects.title: Disconnected – Social Network
projects.description: A fullstack social networking platform with real-time features, post management, and user interactions
projects.problemSolved: Built a complete social platform from scratch with auth, posts, comments, likes, and follower systems
projects.thumbnail: Social network feed with posts, likes, and comment interactions
projects.longDescription: Disconnected is a fullstack social networking application where users can register, follow each other, create posts, comment, and interact in real time. Built with a NestJS REST API backend and a Next.js frontend, connected to a PostgreSQL database managed via Prisma ORM.
outcomes: End-to-end auth flow with JWT and refresh tokens
Real-time-ready architecture with modular NestJS services
Type-safe API contracts shared between frontend and backend
features: Post creation, editing, deletion, and likes

projects.title: E-commerce Platform
projects.description: Full-featured e-commerce platform with product management, cart, and payment integration
projects.problemSolved: Built a complete transaction flow with cart management and real-time inventory sync
projects.thumbnail: E-commerce product showcase and checkout flow
projects.longDescription: A fullstack e-commerce application covering product catalog, cart management, order processing, and an admin dashboard. Built with Next.js on the frontend and NestJS + Prisma on the backend, connected to a PostgreSQL database.
outcomes: Complete product catalog with filtering and search
Cart and order management with role-based access
Admin dashboard for inventory and order tracking

projects.title: Portfolio IDE
projects.description: VS Code-inspired portfolio website with a terminal, file explorer, and AI copilot
projects.problemSolved: Created a unique developer-style portfolio that showcases skills in an interactive IDE interface
projects.thumbnail: IDE-style portfolio with file explorer and tabbed editor interface
projects.longDescription: An IDE-inspired portfolio that mimics the look and feel of VS Code. Features a file explorer sidebar, tabbed editor, integrated terminal, and an AI copilot assistant. Built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS for maximum performance and customization.
outcomes: Unique portfolio UX that stands out in job applications
AI copilot powered by Gemini API for interactive Q&A
Fast, SEO-optimized with Next.js App Router

projects.title: Discord Bot
projects.description: Feature-rich Discord bot with moderation, music, and utility commands
projects.problemSolved: Automated server management and entertainment for Discord communities
projects.thumbnail: Discord bot command interface with music and moderation features
projects.longDescription: A Discord bot built with Discord.js and TypeScript, featuring moderation commands, music playback, and custom utility commands. Deployed and serving multiple Discord communities.
outcomes: Automated moderation reducing manual admin workload

projects.title: Design System UI Library
projects.description: Reusable component library for building consistent UIs across multiple projects
projects.problemSolved: Reduced development time through standardized, accessible components with TypeScript support
projects.thumbnail: Collection of reusable UI components and design tokens
projects.longDescription: A typed, accessible component library built on top of Shadcn/ui and Tailwind CSS. Documented with Storybook, it standardizes design tokens and component patterns across multiple personal projects.
outcomes: Reduced UI development time across personal projects
Consistent design language across the portfolio
features: Custom React components on Shadcn/ui base

fileBanner: // Always open to interesting projects and discussions

readme.mission: Building high-performance web products that prioritize user experience and technical excellence. From concept to production, I obsess over code quality, clean architecture, and solving real problems with TypeScript.
